chunks.text: Empirical Study of Opportunities for Bit-Level Specialization in Word-Based Programs (CSD-00-1126) by Eylon Caspi. Measuring the Performance of Multimedia Instruction Sets (CSD-00-1125) by Nathan Slingerland and Alan Jay Smith. Multimedia Extensions for General Purpose Microprocessors: a Survey (CSD-00-1124) by Nathan Slingerland and Alan Jay Smith. Cache Performance for Multimedia Applications (CSD-00-1123) by Nathan T. Slingerland and Alan Jay Smith. Design and Characterization of the Berkeley Multimedia Workload (CSD-00-1122) by Nathan T. Slingerland and Alan Jay Smith.

Giotto: a Time-triggered Language for Embedded Programming (CSD-00-1121) by Thomas A. Henzinger, Benjamin Horowitz and Christoph Meyer Kirsch. Geometric Algorithms and Data Representation for Solid Freeform Fabrication (CSD-00-1119) by Sara Anne McMains. Enhancing Graduated Declustering for Better Performance Availability on Clusters (CSD-00-1118) by Noah Treuhaft. Exploring a New Interaction Paradigm for Collaborating on Handheld Computers (CSD-00-1117) by Mark Bilezikjian, Scott R. Klemmer, Regan L. Mandryk, James A. Landay and Kori M. Inkpen. A Tangible Evolution: System Architecture and Participatory Design Studies of the Designer's Outpost (CSD-00-1116) by Scott Klemmer, Ryan Farrell, Mark Newman, Raecine Meza and James A. Landay.

Language Support and Compilation Techniques for Regions (CSD-00-1115) by David E. Gay and Alex Aiken. Multicast Forwarding and Application State Scalability in the Internet (CSD-00-1114) by Tina Han-Ting Wong. Entailment with Conditional Equality Constraints (Extended Version) (CSD-00-1113) by Zhendong Su and Alexander Aiken. The XSet XML Search Engine and XBench XML Query Benchmark (CSD-00-1112) by Ben Yanbin Zhao and Anthony Joseph. The IRAM Network Interface (CSD-00-1111) by Ioannis Mavroidis.

An Interactive Framework for Data Transformation and Cleaning (CSD-00-1110) by Vijayshankar Raman and Joseph M. Hellerstein. Practical reinforcement learning in continuous domains (CSD-00-1109) by Jeffrey Forbes and David Andre. A Design Framework for Highly Concurrent Systems (CSD-00-1108) by Matt Welsh, Steven D. Gribble, Eric A. Brewer and David Culler. An Architectural Performance Study of the Fast Fourier Transform on Vector IRAM (CSD-00-1106) by Randi Thomas. The State of the Art in Automated Usability Evaluation of User Interfaces (CSD-00-1105) by Melody Y. Ivory and Marti A. Hearst.

Optimizing the Performance of Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication (CSD-00-1104) by Eun-Jin Im. Evaluation of Three Unstructured Multigrid Methods on 3D Finite Element Problems in Solid Mechanics (CSD-00-1103) by Mark F. Adams. OceanStore: An Extremely Wide-Area Storage System (CSD-00-1102) by David Bindel, Yan Chen, Patrick Eaton, Dennis Geels, Ramakrishna Gummadi, Sean Rhea, Hakim Weatherspoon, Westly Weimer, Christopher Wells, Ben Zhao and John Kubiatowicz. A Framework for Interactive Multicast Data Transport in the Internet (CSD-00-1101) by Suchitra Raman. Reducing the Cost of System Administration of a Disk Storage System Built from Commodity Components (CSD-00-1100) by Satoshi Asami.

GridPix -- Presenting Large Image Files Over the Internet (CSD-00-1099) by Satoshi Asami and David A. Patterson. Bounding Predicates and Insertion Policies for Multidimensional Indexes (CSD-00-1098) by Megan Thomas, Kirby Zhang, Jimmy Shih and Joseph M. Hellerstein. Polymorphic versus Monomorphic Flow-insensitive Points-to Analysis for C (Extended Version) (CSD-00-1097) by Jeffrey S. Foster, Manuel Fahndrich and Alexander Aiken. Querying Large Collections of Music for Similarity (CSD-00-1096) by Matt Welsh, Nikita Borisov, Jason Hill, Robert von Behren and Alec Woo. Tigris: a Java-based Cluster I/O System (CSD-00-1095) by Matt Welsh.

Building VTrace, a Tracer for Windows NT and Windows 2000 (CSD-00-1093) by Jacob R. Lorch and Alan Jay Smith. Market-based Proportional Resource Sharing for Clusters (CSD-00-1092) by Brent N. Chun and David E. Culler. Robust Hyperlinks Cost Just Five Words Each (CSD-00-1091) by Thomas A. Phelps and Robert Wilensky. A Dynamic Mesh Display Representation for the Holodeck Ray Cache System (CSD-00-1090) by Maryann Simmons. Layout Aware Synthesis (M00/67) by Wilsin Gosti.

Addressing the Timing Closure Problem by Integrating Logic Optimization and Placement (M00/66) by W. Gosti, S. P. Khatri and Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli. Adaptive Digital Signal Processing Algorithm for Image-Rejection Mixer Self-Calibration (M00/65) by G. M. Desjardins. Analysis and Design of Low-Energy Clocked Storage Elements (M00/64) by D. Markovic. Extreme Ultraviolet (EUV) Holographic Metrology for Lithography Applications (M00/63) by Sang Hun Lee. Two-Component Plasma Conduction, (M00/62) by J. Lim.

CMOS Baseline Process in the UC Berkeley Microfabrication Lab Report II (M00/61) by L. Voros. Estimation of Transition Probability Matrices in Credit Risk Analysis (M00/60) by Laurent El Ghaoui, M. Oks and A. Varma. Worst-Case Value-at-Risk and Robust Asset Allocation: A Semidefinite Programming Approach (M00/59) by Laurent El Ghaoui, F. Oustry and M. Oks. Effect of Ion Energy on Photoresist Etching in an Inductively Coupled Large Area Plasma Source (LAPS) (M00/58) by K. Takechi and Michael A. Lieberman. Inference of Link Delay Through Measurement Redundancy in Communication Networks (M00/57) by Y. Xia and David Tse.

Improvement of TCP Performance Over Heterogenous Networks Using Continuous Error Detection Based Link Level Error Recovery (M00/56) by R. Anand, Kannan Ramchandran and S. Shakkottai. A Ubiquitous Pollutant (M00/55) by Martin H. Graham. Survey of Single Machine Scheduling with Application to Web Object Transmission (M00/54) by Y. Xia and David Tse. The Framework of User-Centric Optimization in Web-Based Applications (M00/52) by Y. Xia, H-S. W. So, R. H-J. La, Venkat Anantharam, S. McCanne, David Tse, Jean Walrand and Pravin Varaiya.
